payload.answer: Do not store: this is retry/duplicate event context, not a distinct durable memory.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice
payload.reason: The input describes duplicate delivery of the same Slack event rather than providing a new durable fact to store. The underlying preference may be durable, but this role should only decide on the provided input and avoid storing duplicate/retry context as memory.
